memory:memory/2026-04-11.md:27:46.snippet: - `thinkingDefault`: not set (off) ## Lessons Learned - `sandbox: false` is INVALID — use `{ "mode": "off" }` for disabling sandbox - `messageContent` is NOT a valid Discord intents key in OpenClaw config - `allow: true` at guild level is NOT a valid key — to allow all channels, remove the `channels` sub-key entirely - `/reset` sent via `sessions_send` goes into chat as a message, not a slash command — Carlos riffs on it in-character instead of resetting - `idleMinutes` is the simplest way to prevent old messages polluting chatbot context — no cron needed - WS `sessions.reset` RPC requires `operator.admin` scope; scope passing via shared-secret WS auth is complex - HTTP session reset endpoi
